post.description: Update user privacy preferences (analytics opt-out).

Soft-delete user account and anonymize their data.

- Sets deleted_at and is_active=False
- Anonymizes debate content
- User can no longer log in or create debates

For production: consider making this a background job.

get.description:
Liveness probe.

Always 200 if the app process is running and accepting requests.
Used by load balancers to determine if the pod is alive.

Readiness probe.

Returns 503 if critical dependencies (DB, SSE) are not ready.
Used by k8s/deployments to know when to send traffic.

Provider health check.

Returns status of AI providers based on configured API keys.
Used by frontend to display provider degradation warnings.

schema.title: Response Provider Health Api Health Providers Get

get.description:
Detailed API status endpoint.

Returns the configuration and operational status of database, SSE, 
and SOTA AI model providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, OpenRouter).
Used by the public status page.

schema.title: Response Api Status Api Status Get

get.description:
Debug endpoint to check cookie configuration.
Helps diagnose cross-domain auth issues.

schema.title: Response Get Model Leaderboard Stats Stats Models Get
Response Get Debate Timeline Debates  Debate Id  Timeline Get

post.description: Generate a short-lived token scoped only to this debate stream.

get.description: Retrieve cached real-time events from the memory/Redis event log.

parameters.name: token

schema.description: Stream-scoped JWT for EventSource auth fallback
schema.title: Token

parameters.description: Stream-scoped JWT for EventSource auth fallback

parameters.name: last_sequence

schema.description: Last sequence number received by client
schema.title: Last Sequence

parameters.description: Last sequence number received by client

get.description:
Search for users by email or ID.
Returns basic user info for admin listing.
Admin endpoint to view user usage statistics (tokens, exports, debates) with 7-day history.

post.description:
Change a user's subscription plan (admin only).

Validates that the plan exists and logs the change for audit purposes.

Args:
    user_id: ID of user to update
    request: ChangePlanRequest with new plan name
    session: Database session
    admin: Current admin user (auth check)

Returns:
    Updated user info with old and new plan

Raises:
    HTTPException: 400 if plan invalid, 404 if user not found

get.description:
View user quota usage with plan limits.

Shows tokens and exports used today vs daily limits for each user.
Useful for monitoring and troubleshooting quota issues.
Get comprehensive user summary including quota, recent debates, and feedback.
Get support notes for a user, ordered by newest first.

post.description: Create a support note for a user.

Enable or disable a user account.
Disabled users cannot create debates or use most features.

Trigger data retention purge jobs.

Anonymizes/deletes old data according to RETAIN_*_DAYS settings.
Intended to be called by cron job or manually.

get.description: Get the health and configuration status of all LLM providers.

post.description: Perform a low-latency diagnostic completion ping to verify the API key for a provider is valid.

get.description: Get live system metrics: Activation, PLG/Sharing, Billing, and Economics.
Retrieve participation statistics and recent interactions for the authenticated user.

schema.title: Response Get User Participation Users Me Participation Get

get.description: Retrieve claims divergence report. Computes it on the fly if missing on a completed run.

schema.title: Response Get Divergence Report Arena  Debate Id  Divergence Get

post.description: Cast a user agreement vote on a consensus or contested claim.

schema.title: Response Cast Arena Vote Arena  Debate Id  User Vote Post

post.description:
Submit or update a debate outcome prediction.
Once locked, the prediction cannot be modified.
Predictions are disabled once the debate finishes or fails.

get.description:
Get prediction outcomes, community aggregates, and judges' vote highlights/drawbacks.
Resolves predictions on-the-fly if the debate is completed.

post.description:
Starts an adversarial critique Red Team session for the given proposal text.
Runs the risk evaluation asynchronously in the background.

get.description: Retrieves a Red Team session, its current status, and any completed critiques.

post.description: Initiates a user-facing reasoning summary session.

get.description: Retrieves the Oracle session status and all associated reasoning branches.

post.description: Forks the analysis from a specific node in a parent branch using a new counter-assumption.
Starts a new Synthesis Challenge session linked to a specific debate run.

get.description: Retrieves the details, original debate context, and history of challenge rounds.

post.description: Submits a user pushback/challenge, runs coordinator evaluation, and saves the round response.

get.description:
Return aggregate, public-safe platform statistics.
No private data (emails, prompts, run IDs) is exposed.
Cached for 60 seconds to avoid excessive DB load.

Debug endpoint to inspect auth state from API perspective.

Only available when AUTH_DEBUG=True. Never exposes raw cookie values.

Returns:
    - user: Current authenticated user (if any)
    - cookies_present: List of cookie names (values redacted)
    - has_auth_cookie: Whether auth cookie is present
    - cookie_name: Expected auth cookie name
    - cookie_*: Cookie configuration values
    - cors_origins: Configured CORS origins
    - web_app_origin: Expected frontend origin
    - enable_csrf: Whether CSRF is enabled
Debug endpoint to test Sentry integration. Fails in production.

Preview routing decisions without creating a debate.

Returns the selected model and a ranked list of all candidates with their scores.
Useful for debugging and understanding how the routing engine makes decisions.

List all API keys for the current user.

Returns keys owned by the user, excluding the full secret.

schema.title: Response List Api Keys Keys Get

post.description:
Create a new API key.

Returns the full secret exactly once. Store it securely!

delete.description:
Revoke an API key.

Once revoked, the key can no longer be used for authentication.

get.description:
Returns the current status of feature flags.
Frontend can use this to hide/show UI elements.

post.description:
Create or update a vote (upsert behavior).

Idempotent on (conversation_id, message_id, user_id).

get.description:
Get aggregated vote summary for a conversation.

Returns total_up, total_down, and net_score.

post.description: Update user privacy preferences (analytics opt-out).

Soft-delete user account and anonymize their data.

- Sets deleted_at and is_active=False
- Anonymizes debate content
- User can no longer log in or create debates

For production: consider making this a background job.

APIKeyCreateResponse.title: APIKeyCreateResponse
APIKeyCreateResponse.description: Response for key creation - includes full secret once.

debate_id.title: Debate Id
debate_id.description: The ID of the completed debate to challenge

pushback_text.title: Pushback Text
pushback_text.description: The critique or pushback on the synthesis

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: The question or topic for the debate. Must be 10-5000 characters.

config.description: Optional debate configuration with agents and judges.

model_id.title: Model Id
model_id.description: Explicit model ID to use. If provided, bypasses routing engine. Examples: 'gpt4o-mini', 'claude-sonnet'

routing_policy.title: Routing Policy
routing_policy.description: Routing policy for model selection. Options: 'router-smart' (balanced), 'router-deep' (quality-focused). Defaults to 'router-smart'.

compare_models.title: Compare Models
compare_models.description: List of explicit model IDs to use for compare mode.

locale.title: Locale
locale.description: User's locale for response language (e.g., 'tr', 'en'). When set, AI models will respond in this language.

DebateCreate.title: DebateCreate
DebateCreate.description:
Request schema for creating a new debate.

Supports both explicit model selection and intelligent routing based on policies.

parent_branch_id.title: Parent Branch Id
parent_branch_id.description: The ID of the parent branch to fork from

fork_node_id.title: Fork Node Id
fork_node_id.description: The node ID in the parent branch after which to fork

assumption_text.title: Assumption Text
assumption_text.description: The custom counter-assumption or text to inject at the fork point

max_seat_fail_ratio.title: Max Seat Fail Ratio
max_seat_fail_ratio.description: Override for DEBATE_MAX_SEAT_FAIL_RATIO; fraction of seats allowed to fail before aborting.

min_required_seats.title: Min Required Seats
min_required_seats.description: Override for DEBATE_MIN_REQUIRED_SEATS; minimum successful seats per round.

fail_fast.title: Fail Fast
fail_fast.description: Override for DEBATE_FAIL_FAST; when True, abort debate instead of limping along.

predicted_winner.title: Predicted Winner
predicted_winner.description: The persona/model name predicted to win

is_locked.title: Is Locked
is_locked.description: Whether to lock this prediction from further modifications

type.title: Type
type.description: Event type (message, score, vote, notice, etc).

seat.title: Seat
seat.description: Seat ID or name if applicable.

claim_text.title: Claim Text
claim_text.description: The claim content the user voted on

model_name.title: Model Name
model_name.description: The name of the model that produced the claim

is_consensus.title: Is Consensus
is_consensus.description: Whether the claim was categorized as consensus or contested

VoteCreate.title: VoteCreate
VoteCreate.description: Request to create or update a vote.

VoteSummary.title: VoteSummary
VoteSummary.description: Aggregated vote summary for a conversation.
